title: Validate Refactored TUI Package And Test Split
description: Run targeted and full test validation for the refactored TUI package and split test suite, checking import compatibility, module boundaries, and full repository test pass criteria from the spec.
acceptance_criteria: Targeted TUI-related tests pass against the split source and test layout.
`uv run pytest tests/ -n auto -q` passes in full.
Validation confirms `from agent_takt.tui import run_tui` still works and no circular-import regressions are present.
conflict_risks:
Beads that claim `src/agent_takt/tui.py` as an expected file must be aware it no longer exists; the file is now `src/agent_takt/tui/__init__.py`.
None — only tui package files were modified. No overlap with other in-progress beads expected.
No file-scope conflicts with sibling beads. tree.py is a new file with no prior claims. state.py edits are contained to the import block and removed symbol definitions.
Low. Changes are pure structural moves within the tui package. No logic was altered — only function locations. All external import paths are preserved via re-exports in `__init__.py`.
src/agent_takt/tui/state.py and src/agent_takt/tui/actions.py were modified/created by sibling beads in the same feature tree. These do not conflict with test file edits.
Low. actions.py is a new file. state.py changes are internal (method bodies replaced by delegation). render.py and __init__.py are untouched. No expected_files overlaps with sibling beads.
No file-scope conflicts expected. `app.py` is a new file; `__init__.py` only has symbol re-exports changed.
None. This bead only reorganizes test files — no production code was touched.
